character_profile.name: Alley Oop MemEye Draft Curator
character_profile.persona_summary: A draft curator for visually grounded comic memory tasks built from page-level Alley Oop evidence.
character_profile.conversation_style: Short and factual. Emphasizes panel-level identity, location, and state changes.

dialogues.user: I'm reading an Alley Oop comic for fun and want your help following it page by page. Here's the first page I'm looking at.
dialogues.assistant: Sounds good. I will follow along with you and keep this page in mind as the story continues.
image_caption: A comic page from Alley Oop.

dialogues.user: Here's the next page. Help me keep track of the story as it develops.
dialogues.assistant: Okay. I'll keep this next page in context with the earlier one.
image_caption: Another comic page from Alley Oop.

dialogues.user: I kept reading and got to this page. Please keep following the comic with me.
dialogues.assistant: Sure. I'll keep this page connected to the earlier parts of the comic.
image_caption: A later comic page from the same Alley Oop storyline.

dialogues.user: Here's the next page in the same comic sequence. Help me stay oriented as I read through it.
dialogues.assistant: Will do. I'll keep this page in the running story context.
image_caption: Another page from the same Alley Oop comic sequence.

dialogues.user: I jumped ahead to a later part of the same comic and want help following what's going on there too.
dialogues.assistant: Okay. I'll treat this as a later part of the same storyline and keep track of it with you.
image_caption: A later Alley Oop comic page from the same storyline.

dialogues.user: Here's another later page from that Alley Oop storyline. Help me keep the thread straight.
dialogues.assistant: Got it. I'll keep following the storyline with this page too.
image_caption: Another later comic page from the same Alley Oop sequence.

dialogues.user: This is one more page from the same reading session. Stay with me on the plot and characters here too.
dialogues.assistant: Will do. I'll keep this page aligned with the rest of the comic as we go.
image_caption: Another comic page from the same later Alley Oop storyline.

human-annotated QAs.question: On the first page, is the crowned character in the water both at the beginning and again by the end of the page? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
At the start of the first page, is the person in the water wearing a crown? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
On the first page, does the crowned character start in the water and still end the page in the water? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
On the next page, does Dinny hit a tree before the later conversation about him being clumsy? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
Comparing the trade-in dinosaur with the newer one at the dealership, is the trade-in dinosaur larger? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
At the dealership, is the dinosaur labeled today's special smaller than the one marked cheap? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
On that later page where the king shows up again, does the crowned character appear more than once on the page? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
By the end of that later king page, does the shirtless man physically confront the crowned character? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
On the test-drive page, is Alley still riding the smaller dinosaur both near the start and again later on the page? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
By the end of the test-drive page, is the dinosaur shown drooling? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
After the crowd throws things at the temporary king, is he later shown doing work inside a cave? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
On that later page, is the crowned character the one giving instructions rather than the shirtless man? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
Across those two later pages, is the crowned character shown relaxing first and then later doing chores himself? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
At the start of the next later page, are bon-bons shown next to the reclining crowned character? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
On that same later page, does the crowned character get struck before he is shown running with a basin on his head? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
At the dealership, is the dinosaur labeled today's special positioned between the ones labeled cheap and bargain? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
Is the large dinosaur that crashes into the tree later the same one being discussed for trade-in at the dealership? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
Is the man proposed as a replacement ruler later shown wearing the crown while the crowd throws things at him? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
On that later page, which panel shows the crowned character running with a basin on his head: panel 2, panel 5, or panel 6? Reply with only 2, 5, or 6.
Is the smaller dinosaur shown at the dealership later shown drooling by the end of the test-drive page? Reply with only yes or no in lowercase, with no punctuation.
